name: Crunchy Broccoli and Cauliflower Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the broccoli and cauliflower, then cut them into bite-size pieces.
2. Place the vegetables in a large casserole dish.
3. Add the Italian dressing to the dish and toss well to combine.
4. Chill for about eight hours, stirring occasionally.
Yield: 12 servings, each approximately 1/2 cup (70 calories per serving)
1 serving = 1 Vegetable exchange
1 serving = 1 Fat exchange
This salad pairs well with fish or chicken.
